title: Recreate TRI-GITA SERVICES solar website

requirements.text: Recreate the backend Motoko actor that manages solar service leads stored in a stable map keyed by email, with methods to submit a lead (name, phone, email, city, systemSize, message), delete a lead by email, retrieve a lead by email, and list all leads sorted by name.
acceptanceCriteria: submitLead method accepts and stores a lead record keyed by email
deleteLead method removes a lead by email key
getLead method returns a lead by email
listLeads method returns all leads sorted alphabetically by name

requirements.text: Recreate the React/TypeScript frontend for the TRI-GITA SERVICES solar energy website with the following sections in order: Header, Hero, SchemeInfo, OdishaGuide, Services, WhyChooseUs, BankFinanceBanner, WarrantyGuarantee, InquiryForm, WhatsAppSection, Footer, and a FloatingWhatsAppButton. Wrap everything in a LanguageProvider context.
acceptanceCriteria: All sections render in the correct order on the page
LanguageProvider wraps the full component tree
FloatingWhatsAppButton appears fixed at bottom-right

requirements.text: Recreate the fixed navigation Header with scroll-aware background transition, desktop and mobile navigation links, a language switcher supporting English (EN), Hindi (HI), and Odia (OD), and a WhatsApp CTA button. Use LanguageContext and i18n translations.
acceptanceCriteria: Header background changes on scroll
Language switcher toggles between EN, HI, and OD
Mobile nav menu is functional
WhatsApp CTA button is present and links correctly

requirements.text: Recreate the full-screen Hero section with a background image (frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.jpg), a deep navy gradient overlay, translated headline and tagline, WhatsApp CTA and scheme CTA buttons, and three trust-indicator stat tiles.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero takes full viewport height
Background image is displayed with a navy gradient overlay
Headline, tagline, and stat tiles use translated strings
Both CTA buttons are present and functional

requirements.text: Recreate the SchemeInfo section explaining the PM Surya Ghar government scheme, including benefits list, eligibility criteria, and a four-step process (application, survey, installation, subsidy credit). All text must use i18n translations.
acceptanceCriteria: Benefits, eligibility, and four-step process are all displayed
Content renders correctly in all three languages

requirements.text: Recreate the OdishaGuide section with subsidy tier cards for 1kW, 2kW, and 3kW+ systems, rollout phase coverage info, and intersection-observer-driven fade-in animations.
acceptanceCriteria: Three subsidy tier cards are displayed
Cards animate in on scroll via IntersectionObserver
Rollout phase info is visible

requirements.text: Recreate the Services section with two image cards for residential and commercial solar offerings, each including a feature checklist and a CTA button linking to the inquiry form.
acceptanceCriteria: Two service cards are displayed
Each card has a feature list and a CTA linking to #inquiry or the form section

requirements.text: Recreate the WhyChooseUs section with three feature cards using navy, gold, and teal accent themes, icons, and translated titles and descriptions.
acceptanceCriteria: Three cards render with correct accent colors
Icons and translated text are displayed

requirements.text: Recreate the BankFinanceBanner as an animated dark navy banner with shimmer effects, gold stat cards highlighting bank financing statistics, and a WhatsApp CTA button.
acceptanceCriteria: Banner has a dark navy background with shimmer animation
Gold stat cards are visible
WhatsApp CTA button is present

requirements.text: Recreate the WarrantyGuarantee section with three styled cards showing 25-year, 10-year, and 5-year guarantee durations using navy, gold, and teal accent themes with translated content.
acceptanceCriteria: Three warranty cards are displayed with correct year values
Accent colors match navy, gold, teal respectively
Content is translated

requirements.text: Recreate the InquiryForm with fields for name, phone, email, city, system size, and message. On submission, validate inputs and open a pre-filled WhatsApp link with the form data. Submit button also calls the backend submitLead mutation via useSubmitLead hook.
acceptanceCriteria: All six fields are present with validation
Successful submission opens a WhatsApp deep link with form data
submitLead backend mutation is called on valid submission

requirements.text: Recreate the WhatsAppSection with a branded card, translated title, description, and a direct WhatsApp contact button linking to the business WhatsApp number.
acceptanceCriteria: Section renders with translated text
WhatsApp button links to the correct number

requirements.text: Recreate the Footer with two columns: brand identity on the left and contact details (phone, email, address, service area) on the right, with a WhatsApp link, on a navy-900 background with gold accents.
acceptanceCriteria: Footer has two-column layout
Phone, email, address, and service area are displayed
WhatsApp link is present
Background is deep navy with gold accent elements

requirements.text: Recreate the LanguageContext providing 'en', 'hi', and 'od' language options with localStorage persistence, and the useTranslation hook that returns the translation object for the active language.
acceptanceCriteria: Active language persists across page reloads via localStorage
useTranslation returns correct strings for all three languages

requirements.text: Recreate the full i18n translations file with all English, Hindi, and Odia strings for all UI sections including hero, header, scheme info, Odisha guide, services, why choose us, bank finance banner, warranty, inquiry form, WhatsApp section, and footer.
acceptanceCriteria: All UI sections have translation keys for en, hi, and od
No missing translation keys when switching languages

requirements.text: Recreate the global CSS (frontend/src/index.css) importing Google Fonts (Outfit, Playfair Display), Tailwind directives, deep navy/emerald gold theme with CSS custom properties, custom navy/gold/teal color palettes, and keyframe animations for banner shimmer effects.
acceptanceCriteria: Outfit and Playfair Display fonts load correctly
Custom navy, gold, and teal color tokens are available
Shimmer keyframe animation is defined

requirements.text: Recreate the Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Outfit, Playfair Display), OKLCH-based color palettes for navy, gold, and teal, custom border radii, box shadows, and accordion keyframe animations.
acceptanceCriteria: Custom font families are available as Tailwind utilities
Navy, gold, and teal palette shades are available as Tailwind color utilities

requirements.text: Recreate the useSubmitLead mutation hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts that calls the backend actor's submitLead method and invalidates the 'leads' query on success.
acceptanceCriteria: Hook calls actor.submitLead with the lead data
On success, the 'leads' query cache is invalidated

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or any files under frontend/src/components/ui
All Motoko logic must remain in a single actor in backend/main.mo
nonGoals: Adding new features beyond what existed in the original project
Changing the WhatsApp number or business contact details
Adding new languages beyond English, Hindi, and Odia

required: Photorealistic aerial view of solar panels installed on rooftops under bright Indian sunlight with a clear sky, warm golden-hour lighting (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.jpg)
